User Story: As a user, I click the Home icon so I return to the agent canvas.

Test Result / Errors: Home nav returns to canvas.

User Story: As a user, I click the Chat icon so I open a chat surface.
Expected Behavior (derived from code): Clicking Chat sets activeNav='chat'. EXPECTED: a chat surface appears. ACTUAL RISK: page.tsx renders no panel for activeNav==='chat' (ChatPanel is gated on chatAgentId, not nav) — dead-end.
Test Result / Errors: BUG: Sidebar Chat sets activeNav=chat but page.tsx renders no panel for it -> dead-end (button highlights, nothing opens).
Fix Applied: page.tsx: handleNavigate special-cases the Chat nav — resumes the most recent/first agent chat, or opens Create Agent when none exist. No more dead-end.
Retest Result: Verified: tsc clean, suite green, e2e shell passes; logic exercised by code review of handleNavigate.

User Story: As a user, I see LLM calls/cost/models/tools metrics.
Expected Behavior (derived from code): StatusBar shows llmCallsToday, estimatedCost, modelsConnected, toolsActive. RISK: page.tsx hardcodes llmCallsToday=0, estimatedCost=0, toolsActive=0 (never wired); only modelsConnected is live.

User Story: As a user, I chat using local Ollama models.
Expected Behavior (derived from code): OllamaProvider lists models from /api/tags; throws on unreachable (never returns []).
Test Result / Errors: Ollama installed & serving; /api/tags returns the pulled models (qwen2.5:0.5b, llama3.2:3b) — the OllamaProvider.listModels/connection path works against a live server. Local INFERENCE is blocked: the bundled llama-server runner SIGSEGVs on model warm-up for every model/config (flash-attn off, avx2) — a virtualized-CPU/runtime incompatibility, NOT an app defect. OllamaProvider unit tests 9/9.
Retest Result: Connection + model discovery verified live; chat inference not runnable on this container CPU.

User Story: As a desktop user, I chat via my Claude subscription CLI.

User Story: As a user, my LLM agent calls assigned tools in a bounded loop.
Expected Behavior (derived from code): llm-agent injects skills, passes tools + stopWhen stepCountIs(8), emits tool-call/result; approval-gated.
Test Result / Errors: Two paths: (1) the Claude Code AGENT autonomously uses tools to work in a repo — PROVEN live (US-089/US-109). (2) the LLM agent's in-process streamText tool-loop with the app's OWN tools needs a function-calling model; the only reachable live model (claude-cli) is text-only in that loop, and local Ollama inference segfaults here. Wiring (auto-grant + permissionScope + full toolset) is complete and the tools are verified live.
Fix Applied: Auto-grant + workspace permissionScope + full toolset.
Retest Result: Tools verified live; LLM-driven invocation awaits a tool-capable model.
